title: senecio lividus var. litardierei
intro: Senecio lividus var. litardierei, also known as Litardiere's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate liver function and act as a diuretic. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including liver and gallbladder issues, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Senecio lividus var. litardierei can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
